CustomField.formula: IF(TEXT( leaseworks__Competition__c ) = 'Do not know many of our competitors',0, IF(TEXT(leaseworks__Competition__c ) = 'Know who competitors generically ought to be',25, IF(TEXT(leaseworks__Competition__c ) = 'Have good understanding of competitors based on reliable sources',50, IF(TEXT(leaseworks__Competition__c ) = 'Thoroughly understand who competitors are',100,null))))
CustomField.label: _Competition
